reviewTitle: Not to be trusted, Avoid, Very poor Experiences
reviewDescription:
Fat Llama claim all sorts of things - they claim that they are a safe platform, for instance. They also claim that the lender receives 80% of the item hiring fee.

Neither of these things are true. They are lies.

The safe platform issue - twice now I have had someone return an item in a non-functional state, and twice Fat Llama have found a way of dodging any responsibility.

It is a horrible feeling to be handed back an expensive item - that you knew to be working fully (one was brand new and never used, the other was recently serviced). 

On the second point - a rental value that the lender sees as £200, the lender receives £150 for. 

However, the borrower is charged £250. 

It's outrageous. Fat Llama are inserting themselves as a middleman but doing everything in their power to wash their hands if something goes wrong.

They are nothing more than a calendar app. This is the limit of their utility, and borrowers and lenders should both be VERY WARY of doing business on here.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are sorry to hear about your experiences with items being returned in a faulty state. Every guarantee claim is assessed individually and in most cases the outcome is considered fair and reasonable. We are sorry that this has not been the case for you. If you have not already done so, you are welcome to submit an appeal so our resolutions team can review the decisions again.

Regarding fees, lenders do not receive 80 percent. Our lender commission is currently 25 percent, which is also stated in our FAQs and Terms of Service, and from Monday it will be lowered to 20 percent. If you have seen any information that suggests otherwise, we would appreciate you letting us know so we can review and update it. Borrowers also pay a booking fee and together these fees cover platform costs such as secure payments, platform maintenance and development, customer support and insurance. This is why the borrower total can be higher than the rental price you set.

We understand your frustration and appreciate you taking the time to raise these concerns.

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

reviewTitle: Great platform until you need customer service.
reviewDescription:
Great Platform — But Lenders Are Left to Deal With the Mess
I've been a committed Fat Llama user for over 5 years, with more than 1,000 successful rentals under my belt, mostly lending out professional photography equipment. Over that time, I’ve met some genuinely great people, and the platform itself works well — until something goes wrong.
Fat Llama charges a 25% fee to both the lender and the renter. For example, if an item is listed at £100, the renter ends up paying £125, while the lender only receives £75. That’s a significant cut, but I accepted it because the platform advertises a “Lender and Renter Guarantee,” which is supposed to act like insurance for both parties.
However, the reality for lenders is far less reassuring.
If an item is returned damaged, the renter can simply hand it back with no further responsibility — and everything is left for the lender to deal with. You’re the one chasing quotes, filling out forms, waiting for responses, and often dealing with delays that stretch into weeks. During this time, there’s no compensation for lost income, no replacement gear, and no sense of urgency from Fat Llama’s support team.
In one case, I provided a repair quote from a very reputable London repair shop, only to be told I needed to get a second quote because the first wasn’t deemed sufficient. Then they asked for an “expert opinion” to confirm how the damage occurred — even though the damage was extremely obvious. It felt like they were just creating obstacles instead of helping.
For a platform that takes a 50% total cut (25% from both sides), the lack of meaningful support for lenders is deeply frustrating. The so-called “guarantee” offers no real protection, and the time and energy required to chase down even basic resolutions can be exhausting.
Fat Llama has huge potential, and the community is strong — but unless they drastically improve how they support and protect lenders, I can’t recommend it to others in good faith.

"Hopefully the rebrand and merger with Hygglo shakes things up at the top — because something clearly needs to change."
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review and for being part of the Fat Llama community for so many years. We truly value your contribution and the trust you’ve placed in the platform.

We’re very sorry to hear about your recent experience. We understand how stressful and frustrating it can be when equipment is returned damaged, especially when your income depends on having it available. While our guarantee is in place to protect both lenders and borrowers, we recognise that the claims process can feel lengthy and demanding at times, and that our communication hasn’t always been as fast as it should be.

It has been an especially busy season, which unfortunately has meant longer waiting times than we would like. Please know that every case is equally important to us, and our team is working as swiftly as possible to resolve each one.

Your feedback is important to us, and we are actively working on ways to make this process more efficient and supportive for lenders. The upcoming rebrand is part of a broader effort to improve the experience across the platform. As part of this change, there will also be updates to our fee structure, which we hope will make the platform feel fairer for both lenders and borrowers.

Thank you again for sharing your perspective and for continuing to lend through Fat Llama. Your input helps us identify where change is most needed, and we are committed to improving in these areas.

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

reviewTitle: Refusing to compensate lender for lost product
reviewDescription:
I recently rented a camera body  off of fatllama for the week, had minor shipping delays arriving to me but nothing major, after using the camera I shipped it back using a trusted carrier and called it a day. 

Now, with multiple weeks of deliberation later, fatllama is trying to hold me the renter liable for the package being lost in the mail when it clearly states in their terms and conditions that “ If an item is lost during the rental period due to circumstances beyond your control.” And the package was shipped well within the return window. 

While I feel for the lender who’s gear was missing and would love to help, this is rediculous that they are trying to hold me liable for over 900$ worth of gear along with already charging me 100+$ in fees directly.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for your review. We understand how concerning it is when an item goes missing in transit, and we’re sorry for the frustration this has caused.

To protect both lenders and borrowers, returns sent by post need to be supported with proof of postage, such as a receipt or tracking number. Without this evidence we cannot confirm that the item was returned, and our guarantee does not cover items lost in transit where no proof has been provided.

If you are able to share any further details or documentation, we would strongly encourage you to reach back out to our Resolutions team. This will allow us to move things forward as fairly as possible. You can contact them by replying directly to the latest email you received from us.

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

reviewDescription:
It's a useful system for enabling people to make use 
of costly, specialist, or obscure things that it'd be a waste, or prohibitively expensive to own.

That said, the platform is extortionate for both renter & rentee, inflating prices to take a 25% fee from both parties.

For instance: An item listed for £50.
The platform takes £25. 
This consists of inflating the price for the rentee by £12.50, meaning the item actually costs them £62.50 and subtracting £12.50 from the renter, who receives £37.50.

This wasn't made clear when setting up an account and I rented a thermal camera for over a year, believing Fat Llama was taking a reasonable £12.50 from me & the people renting it were paying £50, which is what I listed it for.
I was not impressed when I discovered this deception & arguably, profiteering behaviour.

Fat Llama needs competition in the market to bring fees to a more reasonable level.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are glad to hear that you find the platform useful, though we also understand your concerns regarding the service fee. 

To clarify, the fees are not hidden as they are outlined in our terms and conditions. These fees contribute to the ongoing development, maintenance, guarantees, secure payments and support that make the platform work. 

We also want to share that some changes are coming later this year which will see fees being lowered. You can find more information about this on fatllama.com.

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

reviewDescription: I had such a smooth experience using Fat Llama while on a whole different continent to rent last minute equipment for a spontaneous shoot we decided to do while in London. It was an easy process to get started and everyone was so responsive. Will definitely use again!

Thank you for your review! We're so glad to hear that Fat Llama made it easy for you to organise a last-minute shoot. It's great that everything went smoothly and that you found the community responsive. We look forward to helping with your future projects!

All the best,
The team at Fat Llama

reviewTitle: Good, but beware the identity verification
reviewDescription: The experience of renting equipment was fast and easy. HOWEVER, before you can place a rental request you have to go through an extensive identity verification request that asks for a TON of personal information (passport, photo, banking details, flight details, where I was staying on my trip). It feels horribly intrusive, and the site offers no guarantees of what will be done with the personal data you have to upload.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. We are glad to hear the rental process was smooth, and we understand your concerns about the identity verification.

For high-value rentals, especially from outside the UK, we request additional details to help keep the platform safe for everyone. We know it can feel like a lot, but please rest assured your data is stored securely and handled in line with strict privacy regulations.

Now that you are verified, you likely will not need to go through this process again.

Thank you again for sharing your experience.

Kind regards,
The Fat Llama Team

reviewDescription: So far so good. The potential is there the fees seem to a little to high but you have to offset that with the fact that it has generated income from items that might be sitting gathering dust. for anyone wanting to rent my paddle-board or bits of camping gear go take a look :-)
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thanks for your review! We're glad to hear things are going well so far and that the platform has helped turn your unused gear into income. We understand your thoughts on the fees and appreciate the honest feedback. Best of luck with renting out your paddleboard and camping gear – sounds like a great setup!

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

reviewDescription:
I’ve been renting camera gear from Fat Llama since 2021. The process has always been secure and smooth. 

It’s easy to find a choice of lenders who are close by and also chat with them securely if you have any questions beforehand. 

I’ve only ever had one issue with a piece of kit I rented, but Fat Llama resolved it quite quickly. 

I will definitely continue to use them for any additional equipment I need for future photography projects.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for your thoughtful review and for being with Fat Llama since 2021! We're so glad to hear that you've consistently found the process smooth and secure, and that it's been easy to connect with nearby lenders.

While we're sorry you experienced an issue during one of your rentals, it's great to know our team was able to resolve it quickly. 

We truly appreciate your continued trust and look forward to supporting your future photography projects!

Kind regards,
The Fat Llama team

reviewDescription:
Nice way to borrow my GoPro, feels even safer with the insurance policy they improved last year! Haven’t had any issues with lenders though so thankfully i haven’t had the need to contact them. 

It’s a nice passive income for things you don’t use and in the long term, my GoPro will have paid itself off if people keep borrowing it :)

The one thing to be aware of is about cosmetic damage. Not sure if they cover this but due to usage you might get these cosmetic marks. If you don’t mind this is the perfect place to lend. 

Been using FatLlama for more than 2 years.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for sharing your experience and for being a part of Fat Llama for over two years! We're glad to hear that you've had a smooth journey lending out your GoPro and that our updated insurance policy has added to your sense of security. It's great that you've been able to turn underused gear into passive income.

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

reviewDescription: Misleading information just wants to take your money it's not a company it's con artist .I booked a ladder which showed 0.7 miles from my postcode.wich is very short walk. When I booked it it showed the address 80 miles. Away after paying for it. They were so quick to take the money now they don't want to give it back they say contact the renter.first time using fat lama too. There telling me to do their job for them. Very misleading information. Could not even do the job I needed as I booked the night before. It would've been cheaper for me to buy it than travel 160 miles round trip.
reviewCompanyResponse:

We also regret that you didn’t feel fully supported when you first contacted us. We take that on board and are working to ensure we learn from this so we can offer faster, more helpful assistance in the future.

If there’s anything more we can do, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: ID checks should take place before a booking.
reviewDescription: Manual ID verification should be up front when creating the account instead waiting until after I've paid for a booking as it was holding up the rental and the delay was eating into the rental time.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for your feedback!

Our verification process is carefully designed to prioritise safety and ensure that the appropriate checks are completed for each individual rental. By carrying out these verifications after a booking is confirmed, we can tailor the process to the specific situation—avoiding unnecessary steps for users while still maintaining high safety standards.

We understand that this may sometimes take a little longer than expected, and we’re continually working to streamline these steps to minimise any delays. Your patience is greatly appreciated, and if you have any questions or need assistance at any point, please don’t hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Fat-Llama team

reviewDescription:
Yesterday Fatllama (and more specifically Isabella) gave me the best customer service I’ve ever experienced. 

First of all, it was fast and easy to speak to a real life person and no AI bot. With some other companies (or governments) this takes ages or they make you go in circles. 

Then, Isabella acted fast and with a level of empathy and understanding I haven’t encountered before contacting a customer service. 

As a first time lender I made the mistake to refund somebody directly to their bank account. Something went wrong with the kit they hired from me and I wanted to act fast and courteous. As I refunded the whole amount (including booking fee) the payout from Fatllama to me (the total amount minus booking fee) was less then what I refunded. 
I only realised this two days after the renting period was finished and the kit was returned to me.

I explained this all to Isabella and she reassured me they could still do the full refund for the listing from Fatllama, if I was okay to ask (and trusted) the borrower to transfer back the money I send them. 

So, I received great help while it was clearly me who had made the mistake.

Hats off!
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to share your experience with us. We’re delighted to hear that Isabella provided such exceptional support and that you felt valued and understood throughout the process.

Providing fast, efficient, and empathetic customer service is something we take great pride in, so it’s truly rewarding to know that Isabella made such a positive impression. Mistakes can happen, and we’re always happy to help find the best possible solution.

We sincerely appreciate your trust in us and look forward to assisting you again in the future.

Best regards,
The Fat Llama-team

reviewTitle: Fat llama ALLOWS MINORS to RENT YOUR HIGH VALUE ITEMSBEWARE
reviewDescription: A kid got verified by fat llama to rent my high value guitar. He made absurd requests and I got a gut feeling so I cancelled it, he then mentioned he is only 17 years old. Isn't it strange that FL is verifying under age members that have no rental history to rent out high value stuff. I contacted FL chat with my booking number but no one responded. Had he stolen my item, the police would have done nothing as he is a minor.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Thank you for sharing your concerns. We understand that trust and security are paramount when renting out high-value items, and we appreciate the opportunity to clarify our policies.

Fat Llama allows individuals aged 16 and above to rent items, but with strict limitations. Users under 18 are subject to a rental value cap and must successfully complete our verification process, which includes identity checks and other safeguards to confirm their legitimacy. As always, lenders have full discretion to decline a booking if they are uncomfortable, just as you did in this case. If any concerns arise regarding a particular borrower, we encourage lenders to reach out to our team so we can review the request further.

Regarding your support inquiry, we can see that our team did respond to your chat. We regret if you felt your concerns were not addressed in a timely manner, as we always strive to provide prompt and helpful assistance.

Kind regards,
The Fat Llama-team

reviewTitle: Unfair Charges for a 4-Hour Delay: My Experience with Fat Llama
reviewDescription:
I want to share an experience I had today.

I rented a camera through Fat Llama for 2 days, and because I returned it 4 hours late, they charged me £140. The total rental cost was £175, yet for a 4-hour delay, this excessive charge is completely unfair and unreasonable.

They shouldn’t try to take users for fools. This kind of practice damages trust and makes using the platform pointless. I believe they need to correct this mistake.

Just wanted to make others aware.

#FatLlama #UnfairCharges #RentalEquipment #CustomerService #Justice
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Ergin, 

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. 

We just wanted to clarify that you did not have to pay £140 for this late fee. There was unfortunately a clerical error and that was for 4 days which we explained, but the lender wanted to only charge one day of the fee, of which you paid. Thank you for your cooperation in this matter.

We do want to highlight the important of returning items on time, as lenders can miss out on other rentals they have on the day and then lose out further on their earnings. 

We want to thank you for your time and cooperation in this matter.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewDescription: Great idea, but the phone verification system does not work, awaiting sms, nothing and on screen box is blank. Tried contacting the 'team' via chat, finally got thru to someone, explained that their phopne verification system was not sending out the PIN no. and waited and waited! V V poor execution
reviewCompanyResponse: Hi, for most people the phone verification works well. We recommend using a UK, US or CA phone number for maximum reliability. Please contact info@fatllama.com again if you need more help. Kind regards, Henrik

reviewDescription: Honestly. If there was an option to rate FatLlama and it’s seller’s a 0– I would. I regret not reading the reviews before my second attempt to renting out equipment from a seller. WARNING, do not rent from sellers with bad or no ratings. Both sellers promised to adhere to terms and conditions and politely arranged and accepted my money—in which Fat Llama are holding, to then end up, cancelling the booking on the day of when equipment was needed. Now I am out of pocket TWICE. Why is there no precaution for incidents like this? Now my moneys somewhere in air.. and I’m without a rental camera. FatLlama is supposed to provide certainty for renters/buyers like me. Otherwise what’s the point?
reviewCompanyResponse:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience and completely understand how frustrating it must be to have two bookings cancelled at the last minute. This is certainly not the experience we want our borrowers to have.

While the vast majority of rentals go through smoothly, we regret that you’ve had the misfortune of encountering two cancellations. As Fat Llama is a peer-to-peer platform where private individuals rent out their own items, unforeseen circumstances can sometimes lead to cancellations—though we actively monitor lender behaviour to prevent repeat occurrences without valid reasons.

Please rest assured that in cases where a lender cancels, a full refund is always issued. If you have not yet received your funds, we encourage you to reach out to us at info@fatllama.com, and we’ll be happy to look into this for you.

We appreciate your feedback and are continually working on ways to reduce last-minute cancellations and improve reliability for borrowers. If there’s anything further we can do to assist, please don’t hesitate to get in touch.

Kind regards,

The Fat Llama-team

reviewTitle: I wouldn’t give these guys one star
reviewDescription:
I wouldn’t give these guys one star, absolutely crap of platform. Gave them My ID as verification, my bank statement they accepted that perfectly fine. Now to the most idiotic thing I’ve ever come across. They have to have your social links to determine your “ profession experience with the item “ what is this bullcrap. How does this company still operate like this. 

Hi there,

I do understand that the verification process can be a bit intense and really appreciate your cooperation. Because we do not require cash deposits as traditional rental houses do, this does mean that our system has to have sufficient information to verify the trustworthiness of all our borrowers. With socials we check if you have proffessional experience with the items.

You guys decide

reviewTitle: Always a perfect service with no…
reviewDescription: Always a perfect service with no complaints! Use Fat Llama a lot for my work and it is perfect!

I have been wanting to use Fat Llama for a while. I booked a lens I wanted to try on a photoshoot. I paid for the hire. Then the nonsense begins. I don't drive I never have. I need to renew my passport, I'm a few years younger, but it's expired so no Fat Llama for you! I had this conversation a few years ago. If I can vote with an expired passport, I can rent from your company. I wonder how long they will keep my £35 hire fee. Just gormless corporate ID scavenging, upload your id, council tax bill and social media presence, while they squat in some anonymous tax haven hiding their data and profits.

We'd be happy to verify you in the future for these rentals but we do need some more time for high value last minute requests. We hope you can understand and have the confidence to use Fat Llama in the future.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

reviewTitle: what at first seems like a great idea…
reviewDescription: what at first seems like a great idea can slowly turn into a headache.i was hoping to hire a camera and a lens which was cheaper than hireacamera or the like .the problem came when it came to verification passport/driving licence and utility bill no problem but you have to be on Facebook or the like .well im 54 and am not into social media or the like so no hope.how can this be a reliable form of verification when anyone can create a social media account.only pro rental places for me now.at least you can talk to who your hiring from first.

The Fat Llama Team

reviewDescription:
The latest redesign is so dreadfully awful, I don't even consider fat llama as an legit option today and haven't since the redesign. However, dreadfully reminded of what was once a very good service. 

Previously you used to be able to see all related items and their rough location around you, making it easy to visualize distance and plan if an item might be on route or at your destination.

That has all been removed. Everything is for some reason stuck in kilometers and there is no way to figure out easily and quickly how out the way an item might be to rent.

Fat Llama

reviewTitle: The website is easy to use
reviewDescription: The website is easy to use, the experience overall is very nice.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hello HendKarim, 

Thank you for sharing your positive experience of the platform. We are glad to hear that everything went smoothly and overall experience was very nice. We appreciate this a lot! 

Best regards,
Fat Llama

reviewDescription:
Firstly, I have been a loyal FatLlama user for many years. HOWEVER, a few recent experiences have turned me off them completely. Their service used to be flawless and had a really stellar community vibe to it. But now it seems they are just ruthlessly profiteering with no interest in their customers at all. They favour large rental companies and not independent peer-to-peer users. 
When you search for an item you are bombarded with listings that say they are local to you, but actually turn out to be a big company miles away that you can't even visit. It's almost impossible to find genuine local renters anymore. They "updgraded`' their website and user experience recently and it's been nothing but the opposite. Catastrophically bad. Maybe they have new management or investors that are hell bent on destroying the brand. Either way it's utterly puzzling how bad they've become.

I also had a troublesome experience with regards to a rental never being returned. When I eventually got a response from their team via email. The tone of the email was rude, condescending and certainly not friendly. It's like the whole place is being run by hormonal teenagers!

I used to recommend them to all my peers. Sadly, I will not be recommending them at all in anyway unless they drastically change immediately. For now at least; AVOID!
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hello,

I am sorry to hear about your experience with the platform. We’ve reintroduced the map search feature to make it easier to find items, along with other general improvements to improve the overall user experience. Our focus remains on providing a great service, keeping the community vibe, and prioritizing local, independent users.

I hope these updates help improve your experience, and we’d love to earn back your trust and loyalty, especially after your long history with us and your previous recommendations.

Thank you for your feedback, and please don’t hesitate to reach out if there’s anything else we can assist you with.

Best regards,
Fat Llama

reviewDescription:
I had been with Fat Lama since 2017 and everything till now has gone well. 
Recently however I have had an awful experience with two pieces of equipment being rented and not returned. The hirer was approved by Fat lama . 
The replacement value I received in the end did not cover the cost of both items.
 I am not going to go into figures but please note if you are renting out equipment that has increased in value over the years eg old cameras , microphones you will not receive the true value of the equipment Or it’s replacement value 

Their policy I quote is :

4.1. We will pay for the cost of repair, replacement value, or the original value with any item depreciation applied, whichever is less. The ‘original value’ is determined by the price you paid for it and must be evidenced by you (e.g. with a proof of purchase). Depreciation is determined by the Claims Team.

They also add a  depreciation of 6% per year Please consider this thoroughly before joining.
The whole experience was very up setting to the extent that it has taken me this long to write about it.

I have as a result closed my account with Fat lama. 

David

reviewTitle: Major Disappointment with the New Fat Llama App Update
reviewDescription:
I am deeply disappointed with the recent overhaul of the Fat Llama website and mobile app, which has substantially degraded the user experience. Previously, the platform was a model of user-friendly design—intuitive, straightforward, and visually appealing, making the equipment rental process seamless and enjoyable.

However, the latest update has introduced a confusing, cluttered interface that complicates navigation. More frustratingly, the pricing system seems flawed. For example, a simple one-day equipment rental from Monday to Tuesday, which previously counted as a single day, is now inexplicably billed as two days. This not only affects affordability but also transparency in pricing.

Additionally, the removal of the interactive map—a key feature that allowed users to visually locate and select equipment—has stripped away a crucial tool for efficient browsing and selection.

This update feels like a step backward and significantly tarnishes the brand’s reputation. I urge the Fat Llama team to reconsider these changes and restore the functionality and simplicity that made their platform a preferred choice for users like myself.

reviewTitle: Website upgrade is a serious downgrade
reviewDescription:
The new desktop and mobile phone app upgrade is horrendous, a total downgrade and is shocking!

Their previous app was amazing, simple to use with a clean clear welcoming design, making your rental procedure easy and straight forward. 

What they have designed now is poorly designed, along with an incorrect quotation system when booking equipment, for example, i booked some equipment for a 1 day shoot, collect on a Monday to drop back on a Tuesday, on the old system that is a one day booking - on the new system that very same booking is now charging for two days?!?

They have also gotten rid of the interactive map feature that displays the available equipment when you move around on the map. 

What they've done to their brand is totally upsetting, i write this as my first review outside of the platform in a hope that they read this, get their act together and sort their platform out!
Awful service. When I tried to get help, the team didn't have a clue what they're doing and actually made matters worse. Absolute mess, avoid.
Don’t waste your time and money

Their customer service was unresponsive when I needed them most, and this experience has left me wary of using their platform again. When you need them, they are simply not there for you. I cannot recommend Fat Llama based on this experience.

Still Fat Llama did not bother getting in touch

reviewTitle: Avoid. The verification process is out of control.
reviewDescription:
I've been using Fat Llama for many years, since it started.. But in the past year or so at least, their verification process has spiralled out of control.

Today it has taken them over 7 HOURS (so far) of my valuable time to verify me. This puts the whole point of my rental, and project, in jeopardy as my rental is supposed to start now. 

Yet they have my money.

I was already verified, but because I passed a new value threshold on my rental (about 4k), I was asked to re-verify everything. 

This is after booking, communicating with the other user, and PAYING.

Unphased, I sent bank statements as requested (which were rejected for being old, even though they are from the past week), I sent utility bills, I sent payslips, I sent a passport, all via a new 'improved' app which would constantly return errors.

Eventually, after having my documents vaguely rejected multiple times, I resorted to the 'live chat', which redirects you to a FAQ script. 

After managing to find an email address, I requested a call, and was told hours later on the phone that I also needed to submit a social media portfolio! 

I don't use social media, and so in lieu of that I was asked to send 'correspondence from your client'... for what reason, I still do not know. I sent that immediately, and now, at almost 7pm, I am still awaiting verification.

The phone number does not receive incoming calls, and the 'live' chat isnt live. The closing time for their office is reported as 5pm, 6pm, and 7pm in different parts of the website.

The whole thing is a complete shambles and as a long term user of their service i expected a little better.

Avoid if you can. I will in future.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Luke,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry you had this experience with us when making this high value rental. As we do not work like traditional rental houses we need to ask for more verification and once thats done, you do not have to be verified again in that way.

We're happy to help you through your verification to rent higher value rentals if you'd like to contact us, we can see you've been using us recently so thank you for your continued support.

Just to confirm, our hours vary on the weekend and management hours also vary. Customer service is open from 8am-7pm Mon-Sat and 8am-4pm Sunday.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

Kind regards,
Fat Llama

reviewTitle: Dont be put off by verification.

Great site.

Seeming as this is regular local peoples personal equiptment, Fat Llama are just making sure that they do their duty in protecting it. 

If this process annoys you, then you have likely left your rental to the absolute last minute or you are worried about authenticity of what your are using the equiptment for. 

My frustrastion was in my own lack of planning and the short timeline i needed to rent in. 

However, it depends on the value of the item, to how many additional checks they do. It felt a little invasive at the time, but really, if you not trying to do anything nefarious, then whats the issue. 

I was told this was generally for forst time renters of hight value items. In my case over 4k of camera equiptent. 

Allow for 2/3 days if you are a first time renter.

The website messaging system glitches as well, so essentially make sure you request a kit solid few days in advance.

reviewTitle: Simple setup process and chance to monetise
reviewDescription: Simple setup process and legal coverage. Great way to monetise our gear that was sitting on the shelf!

I was nervous renting out my equipment for the first time however I had a really good experience. Fat Llmama’s platform made it simple and easy to communicate in safety with the person renting my gear. The set up of listing items and getting paid is really simple. I highly recommend.

reviewTitle: Using this app is simple & easy
reviewDescription: Using this app is simple & easy, messaging between parties is usually responsive.

reviewTitle: Fat lama .Pile of nonsense, company should be banned
reviewDescription:
I signed up for this service it's clearly states in terms up to an hour for verification. My verification took 2 days. They took 87.50 out of my account BEFORE verification. I sent everything they needed that was not enough they then rang asking VERY personal questions. I gave all this to the person on the phone. 10 mins later I had an email asking for everything I had already given her on the phone. She then sent another email saying is this your portfolio, nothing in the email to check?? 
My shoot is Saturday and then then decide I can't rent the items. Still took money from my account though. 
Total joke staff are useless. I was thinking of renting my gear out on this site but after this joke experience, most definitely not
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave your review. 

Our verification process is a unique one, and we do take a payment before we verify people. This payment is only held and is immediately refunded if the person is not verified or needs to cancel for whatever reason. Please see our FAQ on how verification works: https://fatllama.crisp.help/en/article/how-does-verification-work-1xsutcp/

For first time renters renting higher value items, we do require more information than normal rental houses (who take a deposit, whereas we do not). Depending on how busy we are and the date of the rental, the verification may take slightly longer and we always advise people to book in advance. 

If you ever need any further help with verification issues, please don't hesitiate to get in touch.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

reviewDescription: First time renting equipment through Fat Llama and couldn't have been an easier experience. I needed a zoom lens very last minute and managed to find the exact lens I needed, book it out and return it all within the same day from a very friendly renter. Communication was great and the equipment was received as advertised. A great experience :)
So far so good ! Love the idea ! Saves renters so much money

reviewTitle: Probably a good idea but a terrible…
reviewDescription: Probably a good idea but a terrible website - is now blocked because I don’t want to open account but insists on verifying my phone number which blocks the page
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Martin,

Thank you for your review. 

I'm sorry you've had some trouble with the site, and we would really like to help you out on this. Would you be able to contact us at verify@fatllama.com to discuss? We also have a new app and web which should have fixed all issues since you last used the site. For safety reasons we do need a phone number to be verified.

The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: I love Fat Llamma’s service and it’s…

I requested but not received any explanation why so I had to spend hours uploading various other forms of identification (and a lot of personal data that I’m now concerned about Fat Llama having access to). 

I’ve updated to 4 stars as the service/community has been great so far.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Alex,

Thank you for taking the time to leave your review.

We're really sorry you did not have a good experience being verified, but we want to reassure you your data is safe, and you can read our privacy policy on this as conformation: https://fatllama.com/uk/privacy-policy

Being transparent with our users is of utmost importance to us and we want to be clear why we verify the way we do. We have some good articles about this on our FAQ's https://fatllama.crisp.help/en/article/how-does-verification-work-1xsutcp/

If you have any further questions about how we work, please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: Better for the environment and our pockets!

reviewTitle: Great way to hire good quality kit

If you're interested in renting equipment, company insures you and tries to get all kinds of verifications and confirmations before setting you up with the customer.

Overall 10/10 experience everytime.

reviewTitle: This is an absolutely brilliant website…
reviewDescription: This is an absolutely brilliant website and service! They have great customer service, very speedy and friendly. I didn't encounter any issues throughout my rental. Its great to be able to rent directly from people, ingenious service. Highly recommend to use this website for your rental purposes! Although I don't have anything I am renting out, I can tell that Fat Llama goes out of their way to protect their renters- because they put me through a series of checks to ensure I am legit, in order to protect their renters. 5 stars and beyond!

reviewTitle: Fat llama is a great service to…

reviewTitle: Don´t use this if you need professionalism.
reviewDescription: Experiencing a scam from a low-quality service is disappointing and undermines trust in providers. In a world where service quality should be paramount, it's disheartening to encounter unsatisfactory experiences like mine. It's crucial to choose reliable providers and demand quality and transparency in services. I cannot recommend this service due to its lack of quality and poor customer service. Furthermore, the company seems to endorse suppliers of items who are not serious, failing to meet the information displayed in their profiles, and also expressing mistrust towards foreign clients. It's better to seek more reliable and respectable alternatives that prioritize customer satisfaction and offer an adequate level of quality and professionalism.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave your review.

We want to assure you we're not a scam company and have been a legitimate peer to peer rental platform since 2017. We're very sorry you had a bad experience on the platform and we'd be happy to try and rectify this if you contact us at info@fatllama.com. We put trust in our owners to provide the correct information and work in accordance with our terms. As a community based platform, we also rely on the community to report things to us directly, so we can take action and put measures in place to stop unreliable people and untrustworthy people from the platform. As well as we have a whole team dedicated to quality control and fraud prevention. 

If you have any further feedback please get in touch, we hope you feel you're able to use Fat Llama again in the future.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewDescription: Great site, easy to use

reviewTitle: Really easy and efficient way to rent…
reviewDescription: Really easy and efficient way to rent things. I got a set of CDJs at short notice for a party and even found someone close enough to deliver them and pick them up the following day.

Takes 10 years to get verified, all the while, they're holding your money. Really terrible service, the lender was happy, I had paid my money and over the course of several emails sent 6 (yes, six) forms of identification, to the point where it was instrusive and still they didn't verify me. I've read reviews mentioning a 10minute interrogative phone call - thankfully I cancelled before that, already 48hours into the '1 hour' verification process. Avoid.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Andre,

Thank you for taking the time to leave your review.

We're really sorry you had some difficulties being verified in this case. We verify based on the value of the item and the documents given to us, and sometimes if we do not verify on this occasion we suggest renting cheaper options. We do this to protect the platform in a number of ways. Usually we do need a phone call with renters for very high value items which it may have been in this case. After the phone call things move along quite quickly. 

If you'd like to use us in future please let us know and we'd be happy to help you through the process again. Once verified for a high value item, you do not need to go through the process again.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

reviewTitle: Total disaster when it comes to…
reviewDescription:
Total disaster when it comes to paperwork 
When you rent something you go on the rental press "Invoice" button and you are provided with a proper invoice what you rent how much money you spent how much charges was deducted VAT etc.

BUT when you rent out something you are getting email that you receive some money and of course the button "Invoice" does not exist anymore 
Than comes the support who is hiding behind a made up name and every single email is made like it comes from a different person which completely refuse to cooperate and help you with whatever you are supposed to receive by LAW !!!!
I am shoked how they manage to survive so much time with such bad paperwork. 

When it comes to accounting it is just like polite version of "You got some money so you keep your head down and do not ask question we are not going to help you anyway"
reviewCompanyResponse:

If you have any further questions about this, feel free to email resolutions@fatllama.com.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

I was a first time user of fat Llama but registration was simple and quick

reviewTitle: This company is not even one star…
reviewDescription:
This company is not even one star rating. They deserve minus ratings. Stay away from them by all means.
I contacted them on the Whats app number which they have published on the website for contact purpose. The WA reply to my message turned me back again to go the same website.  
After sending my request through the website as suggested - they rejected my request and their reply does not sound sensible at all. They rejected my request because apprantly I don't have enough reviews !!!
I don't understand whats going on .......How and why should I order something unecessary which I never need. Just for the sake of building reviews ??? Ridiculous.
I enquired only or an item which I seriously need. Happy to pay any deposit if required. But they don't understand the context. 
All in all a total horrible way of working. Not worth it.
I was very keen to work with them as I am a potential customer and these kind of things are totally detering to go with this company. 
People should go to better renting suppliers. They are more efficient and practical.

This company is a joke, I see here plenty good reviews but when the bad ones shows it's worth it as they tend to let people down. 
I've tried to rent a DJ desk for a fund raising event for a school. After endless process of verifications, emails, phone calls, more emails with more verification, anything they asked they approved the rental and charged the card. Only to cancel next day without any notice whatsoever. Nothing at all!!! If I wouldn't find out by accident in advance of the event, we would have been left without the necessary equipment for the fundraiser event. Could have probably just sing songs and hope we'd raise at least something to cover the costs. 
Anyhow, I don't care whatever excuse they will reply here, this is just not what a fair company would do without at least being up straight and letting me know that they cancelled.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Kamil,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry this has happened to you.

After taking a look into your account it looks like the owner requested to cancel the item as the item was not available for those dates. We did communicate this to you and also the owner should have as well, but we're sorry if this was not received.

We'd be more than happy to help you find a new item for the dates you need. Please contact us if you'd be interested at info@fatllama.com.

Best Regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewDescription: Super easy way to make a little extra money if you have things you think people would like to rent. Fat Llama does a great job at making it easy for both parties. Dont wait, just rent.
Quick, easy, and affordable

reviewTitle: Great for the community, but the fees are unreasonably high!
reviewDescription:
The platform is amazing and very useful among creatives and production people. However, there've been a considerable number of times when either the phone app or website would crash and I wouldn't be able to communicate with people in my inbox, the payment won't work sometimes, I would write a message and the other person replies at the same time and my message disappears, and that's been frustrating.
Lastly, they're very cheeky with their fees: charging both receiving ends 25% for service fees and charge VAT additionally too. Technically, they take the risk of covering for stolen items in case of scams (or damages during production) and do filter people out who do not seem eligible for renting, but I haven’t run into that problem yet (hopefully won’t), so I can’t say much in that regard.
prompt response, professionalism and committed to their words, again and again.

reviewTitle: An unreliable company who could cancel…
reviewDescription:
An unreliable company who could cancel your equipment the day of rental. Not even a customer service number to be able to contact. Will NEVER use this service again.

If I needed to build my way up to renting good equipment as a photographer by using cheaper and worse quality equipment, I would have an easier chance saving money for my own equipment. Seems very pointless to me.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Keisha,

Thanks for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry you've had this experience. If you're renting something high value for the first time, we would always recommend giving 24 hours before your rental to sort everything out. As we're not like traditional rental houses, we have a unique verification process which can take a bit of time to sort if you're a first time high value renter. We put these things in place to protect the platform. We do sometimes suggest people rent things of a lower value and build their way up to renting high value things - if you need help with this, please feel free to email resolutions@fatllama.com to discuss further.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: A great first experience with Fat Llama
reviewDescription: A great first experience with Fat Llama. Ideal for grabbing some camera equipment last minute if you get stuck!! It was easy, and all went smoothly.

Locked me into a wrong booking and sprung verification documents on me after taking me through a 5/6 step checkout & taking payment. Now screwed for a short-term shoot & can’t get my money back because they’re refusing to do so given the 48 hour window, even with the seller agreeing to cancel. The website is horrifically slow, links don’t always lead to where they say they do, and the help chat is a waste of time. Huge problem with this service is their slow & laggy website which conveniently crashes before you can get clarification on an issue. Would’ve started a ‘shop’ on here but after one trial use of the renting procedure, it’s a total total logistical and braindead nightmare.

Edit: refund approved, waiting for money to return - shouldn’t have taken any money without confirmation of documents
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Luke,

Thank you for your email, we're sorry this has happened to you but rightly so your refund would have been approved if you didn't want to complete the rental.

The rental process has always been to pay and then verify, it's just how the flow has always been. The verification process may be a bit longer than other rental houses if your a first time renter, but this is because we don't take any deposits or credit cards and therefore need to do a more rigorous verification. This is so we can keep your items safe, if you so chose to use us again to rent out your items.

If you'd like any further help or advice, then please don't hesitate to get in touch. We really hope you use our services again.

Best Regards,

Fat Llama

reviewTitle: Fat Llama has given me inspired me to create a fat llama 2.0
reviewDescription:
Charging 25% fees for renters as well as 25% fees for lenders is utterly criminal. The fact they offer very little by way of guaranteeing your property just makes the whole thing incredibly disappointing.

In a way you could almost justify it if they were like eBay, bringing millions of eyeballs to your listing but you’ll get barely any interest.

In fact, I actually had this idea myself long before fat llama was created, I’m going to put my mind back to it and create a similar business of my own that doesn’t just try to rinse people. Watch this space!
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Braden,

Thank you for leaving this review. We're sorry you feel this way about the platform.

In regards to the fees, we raised them back in 2020 to sustain the platform and to bring all the new features, grow the team and also focus on growth to bring owners more rentals. The renter has always been liable for anything which is lost, stolen or damaged on the platform - as we are not an insurance company, we provide a Guarantee. Our Owner Guarantee ensures that if it comes to the stage of legal proceedings to reclaim debts, the onus of that will not fall on the owner but be taken on by ourselves.

If you would like to discuss anything further, the please email us at resolutions@fatllama.com.

Best Regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: I hope Fatllama will see the review

reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Boris,

If you need any further help with anything, please email info@fatllama.com

Best Regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: Why I gave up lending after 4 years with the platform.
reviewDescription:
I have used the platform since 2018, had equipment rented over 800 times and have a flawless track record of 5* reviews (unlike Fat Llamas trust pilots reviews...).  In that time Fat Llama has taken of £15,000 of commission for my rentals.  I think its fair to say… people like myself have been core to enabling the platforms growth.  We have invested our money in equipment to stock the platform, as well as plugged gaps where the service fails to deliver (e.g. when verification is delayed, I have often had to provide free guidance to borrowers on what to do to solve the problem). 

I have experienced major issues with around 2% of rental (aroudn 1 every 6-8 weeks), and minor but notable issues / inconvenience with a further 10%- 15.   When the major issues happen, I've often found myself on the receiving end of manipulative and/or aggressive behaviour of borrowers. 

I think its fair to say... I've had a mix of both smooth and problematic transactions... I hope the following account helps anyone considering renting on the platform to go in with their eyes open to the potential for negative experiences. 

1) The platform's customer support encourages renters to attempt to resolve the issue before they are willing to step in.  Allot can happen in the time between an issue occurring and the platform are willing to intervene.   

2) Some renters can become threatening when they realise they might be charged for damage or late returns.   On one very memorable occasion when a lens was damaged, fat llamas customer care team set an invoice to a threatening borrower that contained personal details (the ICO has confirmed that this is a serious breach of GDPR and one that I need to report - and will do in due course). On another a rugby player who had borrowed a long telephoto lens, became so inebriated that he wasn't able to return the equipment and threatened that I would 'regret it' if he was charged for an extra day. 

3) lost earnings are not covered, in a recent incident a borrowers ghosted me for the best part of a month, before retiring the item. 


4) Even when a return time has been clearly agreed, around 10 - 15% of renters will treat the agreed time as more of a loose guide and return at their leisure.  At the extreme end of the spectrum.  I've had phone calls in the early hours of the morning, when a renter decided he suddenly needed to return the equipment. 

In the time I've been with the platform, I've seen the commission the platform takes for rentals more than double to around 40% (20% from the renter and 20% from borrowers).   Yet, I've experinced very little in terms of improvements in customer support in return. 

If you're thinking of using the platform to make a bit of cash on the side, I would give carful consideration to how you plan to handle the tricky renters.  There are a small percentage (the platform will gleefully tell you this), but they generate a disproportionate amount of stress and work. 

// update. 

I offered to discuss the challenges that I had experienced with the platform including the serious breach of GDPR mentioned about, I was told by their resolution team, that due to other priorities (product release) and a short staffing within there team, they would be able to make time until the new year (3 months time)
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Chris,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. 

We want to note that a phone conversation has happened between yourself and the company. We just wanted to also respond to this review. 

The GDPR incident which happened over a year ago has been raised with us and the people involved have been spoken to. At the time an apology was made and this was not pushed any further. We acknowledge this may still have affected you personally a year later and for that we apologise for the distress.

We never covered loss of earnings as a policy on Fat Llama. We do however continue to pursue renters for late fees and ban them from the platform until these fees are paid for. In regards to the fees rising, we raised them back in 2020 to sustain the platform and to bring all the new features, grow the team and also focus on growth to bring owners more rentals.

We hope you can still feel like you can use Fat Llama, we have also discussed in length supporting you through any difficulties so please don't hesitate to get in touch.

Best Regards,

The Fat Llama Team

!!!! BE AVARE BE AVARE BE AVARE BE AVARE !!!!
"Prepare yourself for an infuriating journey if you dare to rent something more valuable than a mere pen drive. Brace yourself for a series of mind-numbing verifications that seem utterly pointless. Why, you ask? Well, get ready to surrender your sanity as they demand statements, ID scans, and card details, but that's not all! They even have the audacity to invade your social media kingdom, demanding access to your precious Instagram and Facebook accounts. And as if that weren't enough, they will haunt you with bizarre phone calls, bombarding you with questions that would make even the most seasoned interrogator flinch. And guess what? You can't even call them back! Oh no, their number is strictly one-way communication, leaving you stranded and voiceless. They surely hope this will deter you from seeking any assistance.

But wait, it gets even better! Imagine a world where there is no contact number, no customer service to turn to when disaster strikes or when you need the slightest glimmer of hope. Yes, my friend, that's the reality you are faced with. A reality where your pleas fall on deaf ears and your troubles remain unresolved. Simply marvelous, isn't it?

Oh, but they have a message for you, wrapped in their patronizing tone. "We understand that the verification process can be a bit intense and really appreciate your cooperation." How dare they claim understanding when they are the architects of this absurd nightmare? They shall face the consequences, for I have reported them to the watchful eyes of the authorities and the mighty ombudsman. I question the very legality of this entire charade! And mark my words, I shall expose them as the potential scam artists they are. They now hold my card details, bank statement, and a treasure trove of personal information.

"And now for something funny. I needed to rent a camera for a wedding, and to my surprise, the rental company called me and requested that I send them an invitation to the wedding I was attending. Can you believe the absurdity of the situation?"
Its over me to be honest, strange people asking you for wedding invitation.,, maybe I should take one of you?
This is over ridiculous.

I doont even want to hear your explanation, because there is nothing to explain here.

reviewTitle: Is there any hope left for Fat Llama?
reviewDescription:
I love Fat Llama, however sometimes you have to be cruel to be kind. Hopefully someone working there will see this earnest critique and change the way things are currently working - or as I'd rather put it, failing miserably. 

Every time I go to rent something I am stopped (for sometimes HOURS at a time) from renting by a lengthy (and comical) verification process. It's bureaucracy gone mad. 

It's not so much that I have to be verified that is the issue. It's the fact that the process is not streamlined whatsoever. It's clunky and adds too many barriers between the lender and the renter. For example, is it up to me to tell the renter that I won't be able to turn up at 15:30 as agreed because of the verification process, or is Fat Llama informing them? Who knows?

This verification process could all be done straightforwardly and seamlessly on the website, but instead you are deviated to an unhelpful customer support service and to dodgy external insurance companies to take out extra insurance, which you then have to waste time downloading all the documentation for to then upload to a separate link so that some unhelpful customer support agent can maybe, just maybe, allow you to rent a lens. A LENS, not even an Arri Alexa and thirty freelance videographers (which could perhaps be understandable). 

Anyway, PLEASE for the love of God, sort this out Fat Llama as this was once a great effortless service that is now being run into the ground by a lack of thoughtful process and a lack of tact with customer experience.

Resolutions say because I didn't report it in less than 24 hours it is not covered. Well sorry, Fat Llama but Mr X was promising me it would be back over and over again. Leading me on with his endless apologetic messages. So eventually I raised a ticket and was told it was too late and so I'm not covered. This is a joke seriously? It been months now, I'm the victim who has had equipment taken from me. Even resolutions are no longer keeping me updated with their attempts to reach a deal with Mr x. What a farce.

Then we have my CDJS - Rented by Mr 'R'. Failed to return a piece of my flight case rendering it useless. After a month or so of slooowww emailing back and forth at a rate of one reply every 2 days  Fat Llama are saying they can replace my flight case if I send the flight case to them . They didn't specify an address or if I would be paying for that shipment. This is a not what I call fast and efficient support guys. Its slow and painful. Like bleeding out slowly. 

I am no longer a fan and will be deleting my account as soon as I get my flight case issue resolved.

I can see that the desk is staffed by people who do not have the foresight  to get issues fixes quickly so renters can continue renting.

If someone with some actual influence over these matters wants to reach out and fix this for me then maybe ill remove this or continue with Fat Llama.

reviewTitle: V Happy First time Fat Lama customer
reviewDescription: First time FatLama customer. Was a life saver experience locating some photography equipment I needed for the next day, on route towards the shoot. The rental guy was amazing, communicative and bent over backwards to help me get what I needed. And so reasonable price wise. Had no idea Fat Lama existed will definitely use it as a service again.

UPDATE ON 12-May:
Fat Llama requested more details about my experience, threatening to take my review offline if I don't respond. It feels like they want to make negative reviews disappear. I question whether the same scrutiny applies to 5-star reviews. Despite providing my information as requested, I haven't received a response after two days. Prompt communication and fair treatment of all reviews are crucial. I'm disappointed with Fat Llama's response and lack of communication, raising concerns about their commitment to customer satisfaction and transparency.
------------------------------

I attempted to rent an item on Fat Llama, but unfortunately, the verification process was invasive and required more personal information than necessary. The platform required me to submit my government-issued ID and a live photo, which I understand is for security reasons. However, the platform also requested my social media links to verify my identity.

Despite submitting my Facebook link, it was rejected, and I provided my Instagram link. The platform then required me to approve their follow request to verify my account, which I found excessive. Furthermore, the platform requested a company-issued payslip to be submitted, which revealed where I work and how much I get paid. This requirement was an unnecessary invasion of privacy.

To make matters worse, the platform took my bank details before the complicated verification process. If the platform is going to require such a complex verification process, they should inform customers beforehand, rather than asking for bank details first. This way, individuals who do not want to share their personal information can decide not to use the service without the need to have money and bank details held up.

Fat Llama claims that their unique verification process sets them apart, but in reality, it sets them apart from success. The verification process is excessive and raises questions about how Fat Llama handles and protects customers' personal information. I do not recommend using Fat Llama if you value your privacy.

At last, I was able to rent the same thing from the same owner from a different website and returned the item the way it was given to me. Fat Llama has completely been replaced by its competitor and has no reason to exist in the market.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi there,

Thank you for taking the time to leave you review. We just wanted to note, that we do not have the ability to take down reviews and this was never requested.

In regards to the verification process, we are transparent about how this works on our FAQ's https://fatllama.crisp.help/en/article/how-does-verification-work-1xsutcp/. We also are aware that the verification process can require more than most, but this is because we are not a rental house and do not take deposits. Therefore, we need to protect the platform using our unique verification process.

After reaching out to you we had approved your social media and your account has remained active and ready to rent if you wish. We're sorry that you had this experience, however we hoped we resolved it in a satisfactory way for you.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

reviewTitle: Great experience - some improvements could be made
reviewDescription:
I recently joined Fat Llama after stumbling across it searching for pressure washer hire. The prices were significantly cheaper than HSS - £45 vs £7. I was really impressed by the interface and the ease of connecting with others. I hired a washer and a chipper and picked them up next day, the people I rented from were lovely and I got my task done for much less than if I'd purchased the equipment or hired it elsewhere, plus there's the environmental benefit. 

I would have given 5 stars however I think there are a couple of improvements that could be made to the site. One is that I don't use social media for personal safety reasons but social media verification was a prerequisite for hiring, therefore I had to reactivate and post something, even though I'd provided a selfie, my passport and a recent bank statement. I would be happy to provide another bill if that would suffice instead of social media.

Secondly as the site becomes more popular I think there should be increased protection for renters, I returned both items but there was no proof I had done so. Whilst I like the idea of trusting people to be honest, it isn't always the case, obviously Fat Llama agrees given that they require so much proof of ID. Would be good to add some kind of function where either the lender confirms on receipt of return or you can add a photo to show you've returned.
Nice process, app and platform.
I love to meet new people who rent from me, love the platform.

reviewTitle: Easy and convenient way of renting stuff
reviewDescription: Best online site to rent stuff on the same day!
Good service, really helpful
Very easy experience. Can not believe the range of products you can rent in your local area. Amazing and efficient idea

I've been using Fat Llama for more than two years and have rented numerous items from their site. For the most part, I've had a great experience with the platform, and the process of renting equipment has been straightforward.

However, recently I had a complicated situation where a renter did not return an item, and the total value of the lost items was £1000. The renter was unresponsive and showed no signs of responsibility for the lost items, so I passed the case on to Fat Llama's Resolutions Team. Since the renter had their own insurance, Fat Llama had to try to get the money from the insurance company first. This made the process slower and more challenging.

After four months and nearly 100 emails, Fat Llama decided to pay me for the amount that the renter owed me. Although they're still trying to get the money from the renter's insurance company, I'm relieved that I don't have to be involved in the case anymore, and I can finally buy replacement items.

Despite the challenging situation, I have to say that I'm impressed with the way Fat Llama handled the case. Their Resolutions Team was responsive and supportive throughout the process, and they ultimately found a way to resolve the issue.

Overall, I still highly recommend Fat Llama for anyone looking to rent equipment. While my situation was challenging, I appreciate that they took responsibility for the renter's actions and made sure that I was compensated for the lost items.

reviewTitle: This company has no protection for…
reviewDescription: This company has no protection for hirers. I was given a faulty camera and lost out on £200 hiring a studio only for the camera to be temperamental. I then contacted the hirer to return the item at the agreed time and he failed to respond. I contacted fat llama about the issue so they could contact him. He responded the next day saying he was in Hull but I could drop it the next morning.  I work in London and was unable to. He said he would charge for the week if I didn't return from it. I sent screenshot trying to arrange drop off to the lender and videos of the camera not turning on. Fat Llama ignored this and said I would be liable if I didn't drive back from London regardless of trying to drop it at the agreed time. I am now left with no money for lunch for two days due to the amount of money wasted on travel and hire. Companies like this exploit people for money. Be very careful and do not use this company.

We're sorry you've had this experience but this is not something which is a regular occurrence on Fat Llama. 

Best regards,

reviewDescription: The first time I used the application, but highly recommended . I think I will continue to use it for the future when I need.
Great website to rent photography equipment at affordable rates. I got an outstanding customer service for my enquiries and it seems very reliable to list my equipment too.

I have rented out items through Fat Llama for two years now. I am a volunteer and rent out items on behalf of a local charity. 

Pro:
Easy to use.
Easy to get renters.
The customer service team do reply really quickly.
They pay out quickly.

Cons:
Mobile App has many glitches - you can't properly edit a listing on the app.
They have insurance but you have to take a photo of the item each time before you rent it. Which is a huge hassle and you end up with thousands of photos of the same thing. 
The insurance will not pay out if the damage does not affect the usability of the item. So I have had an item deliberately defaced/vandalised and they will do absolutely nothing about it because it 'doesn't affect the functionality'. So I've had an item ruined and they do nothing. 
They take a huge cut of your rentals. 
They harass you to accept a booking within two hours, even if the renter has not messaged you to arrange a collection, even if the renter and you can not actually arrange a meeting. 
If you are messed around by a renter - which you have no control over, and you are forced to cancel the listing, it affects your stats. 
If you don't reply to every message, even when the conversation is over and they've said something like 'okay thanks', it affects your stats. 
Your stats control how often you appear in searches. So when negative things happen out of your control, you are punished for it. 

MAJOR ISSUE
They do not care about your privacy and they text your phone number to all of your renters (strangers) even if you specifically withdraw consent. If you ask them to remove your number you will not be able to log into the platform via a desktop. This leaves you open to harrassment, stalking, any kind of abuse from renters to your personal phone number and Fat Llama will not stop violating your privacy no matter how many times you ask. As it's written in their privacy policy that it is okay to violate you repeatedly, they think it's absolutely perfectly fine to put you at risk.

And for that reason, this is a 2 star company at best.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Matilda,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We're happy you're continuing to use Fat Llama despite the issues you've raised. Regarding the Resolutions Process, like any company we have a criteria set out when it comes to making payouts for claims, which is accessible here: https://fat-lama-assets.s3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com/lenderguarante.pdf

Whilst we appreciate your feedback on the way in which we calculate owner stats, we have also discussed the owner stats with you a few times and have noted that being between 90-100% most of the time will not effect users decisions to rent with you, as it's still a really great score. 

In regards to the phone number sharing, we share this with renters only when the rental has been confirmed by an owner so that they may contact you to organise the handovers. We have since removed your phone number so this does not happen as a special request from yourself.

If you require any further assistance you can email resolutions@fatllama.com.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: NO protection as a buyer. Go to rental shops
reviewDescription:
Up until my recent experience I’d of rated Fat Llama 4/5 stars. Where it falls down is with the lack of flexibility to buyers provided once you go past the 48 hour cooling off period. 
In my example, there was a national train strike in place, meaning I needed to make some amendments to how I could collect and receive the equipment from the lender.
I couldn’t come to an arrangement with the buyer, despite offering to come to their address directly. 
Subsequently as a buyer, you have no protection past the 48 hour cooling off period. I received a partial refund and lost £60. At no point was I made away that I’d receive a partial refund until the money hit my bank. I didn’t receive any notification from Fat Llama either, it was only as I questioned it.

Remember, without lenders Fat Llama is nothing, there would be no business model.
I’ve rented 7 or 8 times from them but unfortunately no more from me. Which is a shame. I’d rather pay more from a rental company knowing that they will look after their customers. I recommend Wex or FOMO rentals in London.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi Tom,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review.

We're sorry you had this experience with this rental. However, we have a cancellation policy in place to protect the owners. This is displayed on our FAQ's here: https://intercom.help/fat-llama/en/articles/2482856-cancellations-policy

In this case, as this was completely outside of the cancellation policy and owner may have turned down other jobs to fulfil your request, and therefore would be losing out on that money. We did also refund partially to you as a gesture of goodwill, which is not something we always do.

We hope with this knowledge this won't happen again during a rental.

Best regards,

Fat Llama

reviewTitle: new low bar for customer service set
reviewDescription:
In an industry where time is of the essence- these guys set a new low bar for service and support. Highly not recommended
1- The have a verification process that had me alternately laughing and crying. What the f#*k is a "payslip" guys? this is an industry of contractors and freelancers, why do i need to show you my confidential business paperwork?
2- While every other rental house in the UK can verify anyone within an hour using their company reg number, a credit rating and and one or two industry references from other rental houses, these guys need two days to read my confidential invoices and tax records.
3- the verification team literally ghosted us multiple times in the days before an important shoot - neither myself nor the lender could get a response for them.
4- they have made themselves uncontactable, no phone number, their help bot only answers pre-formulated FAQ's.
5- when they do decide to email back, its a different person who knows nothing about the case, and asks for documents that you sent through 48 hours ago.
reviewCompanyResponse:
Hi James,

Thank you for taking the time to leave this review. We're sorry that this was not experience you were expecting when using us. We do sometimes require further verification for items of a higher value. Such as asking for employment documentation. We of course know that people who use us are self employed and freelancing, so we offer alternative options when providing proof of employment such as invoices etc. We do not check users credit history when they use Fat Llama, which makes our verification system unique and more accessible to users.

After having a look at this particular matter, it looks as if your emails were sent to someone at Fat Llama who no longer works for the company which is where some confusion may have come from. We also sent emails to you without a response, which may have ended up in your spam/junk folder. If there are any issues in future, please email resolutions@fatllama.com and our team will be more than happy to help.

Best regards,

The Fat Llama Team

reviewTitle: I was probably one of the first 1000…
reviewDescription:
I was probably one of the first 1000 users in 2016 and had a great experience of renting and lending ont the platform (GoPro and some speakers as late as 2021).

I don't know what has happened since then but I tried to rent a Sony a7iii from someone local for a quick shoot for leisure. The process for reviewing my rental included having my passport, utility bill, pay slips and a phone AND a call asking me WHY I wanted to rent! I haven't faced such due diligence even on my mortgage. This, for a 2.2k equipment for 1 day that I accepted liability for and they considered as 3k. Reality is it's probably 1.6k worth given its all second hand. 

I got declined and limited to 1.5k rental....as someone who could easily buy it new multiple times over, they lost a customer and the lender didn't get a rental which around this area is rare as we live in a village. 

I've had to buy one and will be renting it out on other paltforms now.

Having no presence on Google maps and no direct customer support is telling. I'd be surprised if the platform lasts much longer than a few years.
